arts.ttl: 'We got nervous!' | Amorim fumes over 'unacceptable' defeat to Brighton
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim reflects on yet another home defeat as the Red Devils fell to a 3- 1 loss against Brighton.

arts.ttl: Calamitous Man Utd confront their new reality after latest Brighton humiliation
arts.sum: Man Utd 1-3 Brighton: Ruben Amorim’s side struggled once again, finding new ways to concede in chaotic fashion as the Seagulls grabbed a third successive win at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Premier League issue statement after VAR ruled out Joao Pedro's disallowed goal in Brighton's win over Man United
arts.sum: The Premier League have explained the reasoning behind Joao Pedro's goal for Brighton against Manchester United being ruled out. Joao Pedro had found the net with the sides level at 1-1.

arts.ttl: Brighton 3–1 Manchester United: Player Ratings As United Suffer Another Home Defeat
arts.sum: The Red Devils have now lost four of their last five matches at Old Trafford, and were second best in this contest.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 1-3 Brighton: Match report & talking points as Red Devils lose at home again
arts.sum: Match report & key talking points from Man Utd's 3-1 defeat to Brighton in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Brighton player ratings vs Manchester United: One 9 and plenty of 8s as Albion cruise to victory at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Brighton secured a Premier League double over Manchester United with a convincing 3-1 victory at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Brighton continue their dominance over inconsistent Man Utd with another win
arts.sum: The Seagulls have now won six of their last seven Premier League matches against the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: £120k-p/w Man Utd Star Slammed After 3-1 Brighton Loss
arts.sum: Manchester United slipped to a disappointing 3-1 home defeat against Brighton - and one player has come in for heavy criticism.

arts.ttl: Four Man Utd stars make feelings clear after Andre Onana howler in Brighton defeat
arts.sum: Andre Onana cost Manchester United another goal during their Premier League match against Brighton when he spilled a tame cross right at the feet of Georginio Rutter

arts.ttl: Denis Law remembered as Man United pay emotional tribute at Old Trafford with bagpipers
arts.sum: Law - who was part of the club's famous 'Holy Trinity' with the late George Best and Sir Bobby Charlton - sadly died on Friday night
